# Pull Request

## Documentation-Only Repository

This public repo is documentation-only during beta. Pull requests should only update:

- Public documentation (markdown files in `docs/`)
- Screenshots and diagrams (in `assets/`)
- Issue templates
- Repo metadata

## Changes

**What does this PR update?**


**Why is this change needed?**


## Checklist

- [ ] Changes are documentation-only (no source code)
- [ ] No private information, paths, or secrets included
- [ ] Mermaid diagrams render correctly
- [ ] Links are valid
- [ ] Spelling and grammar checked
